content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Addressed all 6 pending amendments: (1+6) Controller-sync errors on claim failure are now logged with tracing::warn instead of silently discarded. (2) sync_flush error message clarifies the bead was locally claimed but remote sync failed. (3) Reverted unrelated timeout change in requirements_drafting/service.rs (3600s back to 300s). (4) claim_bead_in_br now rejects in_progress beads claimed by other processes — idempotent retry only succeeds when the milestone controller already has the bead as active_bead_id in Claimed state (proving ownership). (5) ProjectId::new validation moved before claim_bead_in_br; post-claim project creation failures now transition controller to NeedsOperator so the dangling in_progress bead gets operator attention.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1+6: Replace `let _ = sync_controller_state(...)` with `if let Err(controller_error) = ...` that logs via tracing::warn, ensuring claim-failure controller-sync errors are observable even when the CLI error is returned
2. [Completed] Amendment 2: Rewrite sync_flush error message to clarify the bead was locally claimed (status set to in_progress) but remote sync failed, and that `br sync --flush-only` will retry
3. [Completed] Amendment 3: Revert timeout in requirements_drafting/service.rs from 3600s back to 300s (unrelated to bead claiming)
4. [Completed] Amendment 4: Add is_our_active_bead() helper that checks if the milestone controller already has the bead_id as active_bead_id in Claimed state. claim_bead_in_br now only accepts an in_progress bead as idempotent when ownership is proven; otherwise returns 'claimed by another process' error
5. [Completed] Amendment 5: Move ProjectId::new validation before claim_bead_in_br to prevent side effects on invalid input. Wrap create_project_from_bead_context in match to transition controller to NeedsOperator on post-claim project creation failure
6. [Completed] Update claim_bead_in_br signature to accept milestone_id parameter for ownership verification
7. [Completed] Update test: rename claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_idempotently_when_already_in_progress to claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_idempotently_when_our_own_prior_claim, add controller initialization to prove ownership
8. [Completed] Add test: claim_bead_in_br_rejects_bead_claimed_by_another_process — verifies that an in_progress bead without matching controller ownership is rejected
9. [Completed] Add ensure_milestone_dir helper to reduce test boilerplate for milestone directory setup
10. [Completed] Update all existing claim test calls to pass milestone_id parameter
11. [Completed] Run cargo fmt to fix formatting issues in edited code
12. [Completed] Run cargo test — 1583 total tests pass (659 lib + 166 cli + 1 tmux + 757 unit), 0 failures
13. [Completed] Verify cargo clippy: same 19 pre-existing errors, no new violations from amendments
14. [Completed] Verify cargo fmt --check: clean after formatting pass

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 1583 total tests pass (659 lib + 166 cli + 1 tmux + 757 unit), 0 failures
- cargo fmt --check: clean (no formatting issues)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: 19 errors, all pre-existing (identical set to base commit)
- claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_on_update_and_sync: passes with new milestone_id parameter
- claim_bead_in_br_fails_when_update_exits_nonzero_and_bead_not_in_progress: passes with new signature
- claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_idempotently_when_our_own_prior_claim: passes — controller initialized with matching bead, proving ownership
- claim_bead_in_br_rejects_bead_claimed_by_another_process: NEW — passes, verifies in_progress bead without controller ownership returns 'claimed by another process' error
- claim_failure_transitions_controller_to_needs_operator: passes with updated claim_bead_in_br signature
- successful_claim_records_task_id_in_controller: passes with updated claim_bead_in_br signature
- requirements_drafting/service.rs timeout reverted to 300s (verified in source)

## Outstanding Risks

- All 19 clippy errors remain pre-existing (verified identical on base commit); no new violations introduced
